title: Sports and fitness
explanation:
Sports and fitness

  • sports: tennis, volleyball, athletics, martial arts, yoga
  • places: court, pitch, track, pool
  • words: coach, referee, score, draw, beat, train

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The football match ended in a 2-2 ____. | *draw | score | coach
Our team ____ the champions 3-1. | *beat | drew | trained
The ____ blew the whistle. | *referee | coach | track
She ____ three times a week for the marathon. | *trains | scores | draws

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: They play ____ on the beach. | volleyball
He runs on the ____ at the stadium. | track

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: We play football on a ____. | *pitch | court | pool
Basketball is played on a ____. | *court | pitch | track
Our ____ gives us exercises every session. | *coach | referee | score
She competes in ____ — running and jumping. | *athletics | yoga | volleyball
